gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer reported no findings, verified tests/test_engine_adapters.py, and approved the focused schema hardening.
verification: python -m pytest tests/test_engine_adapters.py; python -m pytest tests/test_release_evidence.py tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py::test_repository_directories_have_readme_or_package_docstring; python -m pytest -q; poetry check; poetry install --dry-run; poetry install --dry-run --extras databricks --extras test; poetry build; GPT-5.5 review approved with no findings.
what_changed: Engine KV connector action records now reject unsupported top-level and nested action keys before native adapter parsing.
why: Keeps out-of-process vLLM/SGLang native adapter descriptors fail-closed so release evidence and engine boundaries cannot silently carry stale or debug payloads.
